candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.
Not revenue; this is cost of revenue/COGS.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the provided candidate that directly represents top-line revenue. Although 'Net sales' is also present and equivalent here, candidate-list preference applies and 'Total Revenue' is fully suitable.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and merchandise in stock
candidates.why: Inventory balance sheet item, not period COGS expense.
Valid COGS/cost of sales line, but appears to be a total/subtotal and a more direct row 'Costs of goods sold' exists in the preview.

variables.notes: Used a row outside the candidate list because the candidate list only offers the subtotal-style 'Cost of Revenues - Total', while the preview contains the more direct and preferable expense label 'Costs of goods sold'. Per rules, this requires manual review. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Costs of goods sold

candidates.why: Direct SG&A overhead component.
Direct SG&A overhead component.
Operating overhead bucket above operating profit; suitable SG&A component when no explicit SG&A total exists.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset detail, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead component rows above operating profit. Excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, finance items, and balancing/total rows.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided income statement preview.

candidates.why: Core recurring interest expense on borrowings; strong match for interest expense.
Recurring financing cost related to lease liabilities; should be included with interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure that appears duplicative of lease interest; avoid double counting when the main line exists.
Financial income, opposite of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected the granular recurring finance cost components and excluded broader net finance totals, FX items, and supplemental duplicate lease-interest disclosure.

candidates.why: Valid equity line, but less preferred if owner/parent-attributable equity is available because BE should exclude non-controlling interests.
Share count, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent LIABILITIES Non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Best match because it is equity attributable to owners of the parent, which excludes non-controlling interests.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent LIABILITIES Non-current liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity over 'Total Equity' to avoid potential double counting with minority interests.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income subtotal, not a balance sheet minority/non-controlling interest line.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest/minority interest line is visible on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses owner-attributable equity, MIB is left empty.
